SELECT 
    diff_SME_LAM,
    diff_LAM_KAM,
    diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    WITH total_per_customer AS (
        SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth
        WHERE Date LIKE '2013%'
        GROUP BY CustomerID
    ),
    min_total AS (
        SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption FROM total_per_customer
    ),
    min_customers AS (
        SELECT tc.CustomerID, tc.total_consumption
        FROM total_per_customer tc
        JOIN min_total mt ON tc.total_consumption = mt.min_consumption
    ),
    segment_avg AS (
        SELECT c.Segment, AVG(mc.total_consumption) AS avg_total
        FROM min_customers mc
        JOIN customers c ON mc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    )
    SELECT 
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='SME') -
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') -
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') -
        (SELECT avg_total FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH pct AS (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
     AND substr(Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment FROM pct
WHERE pct_inc = (SELECT MAX(pct_inc) FROM pct)
   OR pct_inc = (SELECT MIN(pct_inc) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN i.male_pct > o.male_pct THEN 'Inpatient'
    WHEN i.male_pct < o.male_pct THEN 'Outpatient'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS which_more,
  ABS(i.male_pct - o.male_pct) AS deviation_pct
FROM (
  SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS male_pct
  FROM Patient
  WHERE Admission = '-'
) i,
(
  SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS male_pct
  FROM Patient
  WHERE Admission = '+'
) o;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
